text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm, something's off... Maybe her nose needs to be positioned
higher...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Mejiro Dober sitting in a corner in the academy library. She
wears a concentrated look on her face, and she seems to be drawing
something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No good. I should probably go back to the outline.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's erase this... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her arm slips as she applies vigorous force toward erasing the
contents of the page, and she knocks some stationery supplies onto
the ground.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh sheesh, now I've done it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I lean down and pick up the notebook that had slipped onto the
floor. It's open to a page with an illustration of an anime character.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the main heroine of the long-running kids' anime Veggie Caroline. The notebook seems to be filled with similar such practice illustrations.
choice_data_list: I'll put this over here.
I'll put this over here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Thanks...
choice_data_list: That Caroline illustration is really good.
That Caroline illustration is really cute.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Thank you for the help.
choice_data_list: That Caroline illustration is really good.
That Caroline illustration is really cute.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Don't you dare look!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh... D-did you see that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make the excuse that it was simply due to the page being open to
that spot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make the excuse that it was simply due to the page being open to
that spot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You must think it looks pretty awful, don't you?
choice_data_list: Not at all.
I don't think so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I know, I know... It doesn't look anything like her.
choice_data_list: Not at all.
I don't think so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The character's eyes overflow with a sparkly confidence—hope for the
future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The character's eyes overflow with a sparkly confidence—hope for the
future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression looks kind, and I tell her that Caroline has the kind of
stylish eyelashes you don't normally see on an anime character.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You aren't... making fun of me, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you don't have to go that far. I'm glad that you like my
drawing, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I tend to draw in more of a shojo manga style... I'm well aware that it
doesn't really resemble her.
choice_data_list: It's really cute!
It's really cute!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I tend to draw in more of a shojo manga style. It's kind of a habit at
this point.
choice_data_list: It's really cute!
It's really cute!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh come on, knock it off already!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh come on, you're embarrassing me!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Ahem... Please lower your voice in the library.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Ahem... Please lower your voice in the library.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
See? We got yelled at. Come on, Trainer. It's almost time for today's
session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we walk over toward the training staff room, I decide to ask her a
question out of curiosity.
choice_data_list: Are you a fan of "Veggie Caroline"?
Are you a fan of "Veggie Caroline"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I mean... I watched it when I was a kid.
choice_data_list: But you draw the characters quite a lot, right?
But you draw the characters quite a lot, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't go that far... I just watched it a lot as a kid. You recognized
the character, so I'm guessing it's the same for you.
choice_data_list: But you draw the characters quite a lot, right?
But you draw the characters quite a lot, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's just a coincidence. I simply like to draw.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's just a way to pass the time. I do love drawing quite a lot, but the
characters are just coincidental.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I could draw characters from many other anime if I wanted to!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I happened to catch it on TV recently, so the urge to draw them kind
of just struck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she says this, I can't help but recall the face that she was
making while she was drawing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she says this, I can't help but recall the face that she was
making while she was drawing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At first I thought that it was something that she had to do, but if it's
simply one of her hobbies...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I just know that I would face a repeat of that scrimmage race if I just
let things be, however.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I just know that I would face a repeat of that scrimmage race if I just
let things be, however.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking that talking to you could be some good mental
training for me! You can do that much as my assistant trainer, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I was hoping... maybe I could talk with you to help me build some
mental fortitude. Would that be okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she may still feel rather uneasy about opening up about her
personal interests, to say the least about any worries she may have.
choice_data_list:
If anything is ever troubling you, I'm always here
to help.

If anything is ever troubling you, I'm always here
to help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she may still feel rather uneasy about opening up about her
personal interests, to say the least about any worries she may have.
choice_data_list:
If anything is ever troubling you, I'm always here
to help.

If anything is ever troubling you, I'm always here
to help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah... okay. I'll remember that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, thank you. Right, it's probably best to talk it over if
something's bothering me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though we have yet to share more than just a few words, I do feel like
we've gotten a little better at understanding each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though we have yet to share more than just a few words, I do feel like
we've gotten a little better at understanding each other.
